Career Anchors

Early education phase before moving to Sekondi-Takoradi.

St. John's School - Sekondi

General Arts track, 2009-2013, with WASSCE completion.

University of Cape Coast

Proceeded in 2014 for B.A. Social Science (Economics and Geography).

Hubtel Experience

Retailer Relationship Executive (2023-2025), then Relationship Manager (2025-present).

Cross-Functional Path

Experience in operations support, software testing, HR support, and client growth work.
